title: History Suggests This Unheralded S&P 500 Dividend Stock Is a No-Brainer to Buy and Hold Forever
text: FactSet's strong customer retention and high cash generation may indicate a wide moat. Its 25% free-cash-flow margins provide ample room for reinvesting in the company.

title: FactSet (FDS) Rises 11% Year to Date: Here's What to Know
text: FactSet (FDS) continues to ride on a growing customer base and strong global presence.

title: 2 Top Financial Services Stocks to Buy in October
text: Financial markets rely on a multitude of companies to grow and evolve. CME Group is the top derivatives exchange operator and benefits from volatile markets.
